traits.name: Extra Language
traits.desc: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: Accustomed to underground life, you have superior vision in dark and dim conditions. You can see in dim light within 60 ft. as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against poison, resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.desc: Proficiency with battleaxe, handaxe, light hammer, and warhammer.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.desc: Proficiency with smith's tools, brewer's supplies, or mason's tools (your choice).

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.desc: Double proficiency bonus on History checks related to the origin of stonework.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.desc: Your hit point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 every time you gain a level.

traits.name: Dwarven Armor Training
traits.desc: You have proficiency with light and medium armor.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: Superior vision in dark and dim conditions. 60 ft. darkvision.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.desc: Proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Trance
traits.desc: You don't need to sleep. Instead, you meditate deeply for 4 hours a day, gaining the same benefit as a human from 8 hours of sleep.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.desc: Proficiency with longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.desc: You know one cantrip of your choice from the wizard spell list (INT is your spellcasting ability).

traits.name: Extra Language
traits.desc: You can speak, read, and write one extra language of your choice.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.desc: Proficiency with longsword, shortsword, shortbow, and longbow.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.desc: Your base walking speed increases to 35 ft.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.desc: You can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured by natural phenomena.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.desc: Your darkvision extends to 120 ft.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.desc: Disadvantage on attack rolls and Perception checks that rely on sight when in direct sunlight.

traits.name: Drow Magic
traits.desc: You know the Dancing Lights cantrip. At 3rd level, Faerie Fire once per day. At 5th, Darkness once per day (CHA).

traits.name: Drow Weapon Training
traits.desc: Proficiency with rapiers, shortswords, and hand crossbows.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.desc: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can reroll and must use the new roll.

traits.name: Brave
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.desc: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.desc: You can attempt to hide even when only obscured by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Stout Resilience
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against poison, resistance against poison damage.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.desc: You have draconic ancestry. Choose a dragon type, which determines your breath weapon and damage resistance.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.desc: Use your action to exhale destructive energy (2d6 damage, Dex or Con save DC 8 + CON mod + proficiency). Usable once per short or long rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.desc: Resistance to the damage type associated with your draconic ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: Accustomed to life underground, you have darkvision to 60 ft.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.desc: Advantage on all INT, WIS, and CHA saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.desc: You know the Minor Illusion cantrip (INT is your spellcasting ability).

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.desc: You can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.desc: Double proficiency bonus on History checks related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.desc: Proficiency with artisan's tools (tinker's tools). You can spend 1 hour and 10 gp to construct a tiny clockwork device.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft. darkvision.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.desc: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put you to sleep.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.desc: You gain proficiency in two skills of your choice.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft. darkvision.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.desc: You gain proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.desc: When you are reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 hit point instead. Once per long rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.desc: When you score a critical hit with a melee weapon attack, you can roll one of the weapon's damage dice one additional time.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.desc: 60 ft. darkvision.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.desc: Resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.desc: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. At 3rd level, Hellish Rebuke (1/day). At 5th level, Darkness (1/day). CHA is your spellcasting ability.
